name: Spaced Repetition Warmup — 30 min rotating queue
description: A warmup that touches different technique items each session. Runs off a rotating pool so nothing gets over-drilled and nothing gets forgotten.

items.label: Pick today's 5 items from your queue
items.instruction: From your technique library (major scales, arpeggio patterns, licks, chord voicings, ear-training sets — whatever you have), pick 5 items to touch today. Rotate: prefer items you haven't touched in a while over items you drilled yesterday. If you don't have a queue yet, start with 5 major-scale keys.

items.label: Item 1 — 5 minutes
items.instruction: Play through the first item. Focus on cleanliness. Rate it at the end: solid / shaky. Solid items go to a longer interval next time; shaky items stay in daily rotation.

items.label: Item 2 — 5 minutes
items.instruction: Second item. Same rating at the end.

items.label: Log the ratings
items.instruction: Note which items were solid and which were shaky. Solid → longer interval (skip a few days). Shaky → stay in near-term rotation. Over weeks, mature items get touched less; new material gets touched daily.
